## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply by replacing [ ] with [x]. -->

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** — Non-breaking change that fixes an issue
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** — Non-breaking change that adds functionality
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** — Fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected
- [ ] 📝 **Documentation** — Changes to documentation only
- [ ] 🏗️ **Infrastructure** — Changes to Terraform, Kubernetes manifests, Docker, or CI/CD
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** — Code restructuring without changing external behavior
- [ ] 🧪 **Test** — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔧 **Chore** — Build process, dependency updates, or tooling changes

## Checklist

<!-- Ensure all items are completed before requesting review. -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards and style guide
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have added or updated JSDoc/inline documentation as needed

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the changes in a local Docker Compose environment

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the README or relevant docs (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated API documentation for any endpoint changes
- [ ] I have updated environment variable documentation (`.env.example`)

### Deployment

- [ ] My changes do not require additional infrastructure changes (or I have documented them)
- [ ] I have updated Kubernetes manifests if deployment configuration changed
- [ ] Database migration files are included (if schema changes were made)

### Security

- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, credentials, or API keys
- [ ] Input validation is implemented for any new API endpoints
- [ ] Authentication/authorization is properly enforced
